coreJoins: PUB.ECORev -> PUB.ECOMtl ON Company + AltMethod + GroupID + PartNum + RevisionNum
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.PartNum,a.RevisionNum,a.Approved,a.ApprovedBy, a.ApprovedDate,b.PullAsAsm,b.ViewAsAsm,
b.QtyPer,b.MtlSeq,b.MtlPartNum,b.MfgComment,c.PartDescription
FROM PUB.ECORev a
LEFT JOIN PUB.ECOMtl b 
ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.RevisionNum = b.RevisionNum AND a.PartNum = b.PartNum AND a.GroupID = b.GroupID AND a.AltMethod = b.AltMethod )
LEFT JOIN PUB.Part c
ON (b.MtlPartNum= c.PartNum AND b.Company = c.Company)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' 
order by b.mtlseq asc

coreJoins: PUB.JobOper -> PUB.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
PUB.OpMaster -> PUB.JobOpDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
PUB.ResourceGroup -> PUB.LaborDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
businessFamilies.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT
case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end as 'fx',

      count(A3.Description) as nDescription

       FROM PUB.JobHead b
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOper a ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.JobNum = b.JobNum)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB."Resource" h ON (d.ResourceID = h.ResourceID AND D.Company=h.Company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
WHERE b.Company ='jctimes' AND b.ReqDueDate >='2020-1-1' AND a.Date20>='2020-2-1'
 AND A.OpComplete<>1   and a.opcode='wb'
GROUP BY case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end
order by b.ReqDueDate

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT A.JobNum ,A.AssemblySeq ,A.OprSeq ,a.ActProdHours,B.PartNum ,B.PartDescription ,B.ReqDueDate,A.Date20,A.CommentText,A.OpCode ,C.OpDesc ,D.ResourceGrpID,E.Description 
       ,Case when A.Number10=0 then '99' else CASe WHEN  A.Number10<10 THEN '0'+ cast(Ceiling(A.Number10) AS Nvarchar) ELSE cast(Ceiling(A.Number10) AS Nvarchar) End end as Number09,
       A3.PartNum as nPartNum,A3.Description as nDescription,A.Character09,A.OpComplete,A.Date01,A.Date02,A.ProdStandard,a.ActProdHours,
       convert(nvarchar(10),A.date20 ,120)+ ' ' +a.Character09 AS jsdate ,g.name,
       convert(nvarchar(10),f.clockindate ,120)+ ' ' +f.DspClockInTime AS indate ,
       convert(nvarchar(10),f.ApprovedDate ,120)+ ' ' +f.DspClockoutTime AS outdate  
                   from JobOper A
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
	   LEFT JOIN erp.JobHead B ON (A.JobNum=B.JobNum AND A.Company=B.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
       wHERE A.Company ='jctimes'  and a.date02 >='2020-1-1' and a.date02<=getdate()+1
       and a.checkbox01 = 0
order by c.opdesc

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,c.VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM PUB.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PUB.PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN PUB.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN PUB.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN PUB.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2018-10-25' AND a.Approve ='1'
AND c.VendorID <>'1019'
 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  ${cname} ${orderby}

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
--已完工项目进度查询
select a.PartNum,b.PartNum PartNum2,a.OrderNum,a.OrderLine,b.OrderLine OrderLine2 
into #AAA
from erp.OrderDtl a
inner join erp.OrderDtl b on a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderLine<>b.OrderLine 
inner join erp.OrderHed c on c.Company=a.Company and c.OrderNum=a.OrderNum
where 1=1 and a.Company='jctimes' and  a.ProdCode in('401','0918','0910','091020','091031','403','404') 
and b.ProdCode not in('401','0918','0910','091020','091031','403','404','0901') 
and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.RequestDate >'2023-01-01'
 ${if (len(交期开始日期)==0,"","and a.RequestDate >='"+交期开始日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(交期结束日期)==0,"","and a.RequestDate <='"+交期结束日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(下单开始日期)==0,"","and c.OrderDate >='"+下单开始日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(下单结束日期)==0,"","and c.OrderDate <='"+下单结束日期+"'")}

SELECT DISTINCT  *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        a.Character01 AS 项目负责人,
        a.Character02 AS 销售负责人,
        a.OrderNum AS 订单编号,
        a.OrderDate AS 下单日期,
        b.NeedByDate AS 订单交期,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.OrderDate, b.NeedByDate) AS 订单周期,
        c.Description AS 类别,
        b.PartNum AS 产品编号,
        b.LineDesc AS 产品描述,
        xldate AS 下料出图,
        scdate AS BOM拆图,
        CASE 
            WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
            WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
            ELSE G.ApprovedDate 
        END AS 澄江到料,
        h.ApprovedDate AS 总厂到料,
        I.ApprovedDate AS 打光检验日期,
        J.ApprovedDate AS 合模日期,
        k.ApprovedDate AS 完工日期,
        l.TranDate AS 入库日期,
        b.Character03 AS 产品状态,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN (ISNULL(K.ApprovedDate, '') <> '' 
                  OR ISNULL(l.TranDate, '') <> '' 
                  OR b.OpenLine = 0 ) AND Q.ProdCode NOT IN ('0905') and  b.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-096'
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END) OVER (PARTITION BY a.OrderNum, b.Character03) AS 入行库数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProdCode NOT IN ('0905') and  b.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-096' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) OVER (PARTITION BY a.OrderNum, b.Character03) AS 订单总行数,
        --ISNULL(NULLIF(M.技术人员, ''), d.Name) AS 技术人员,
		 COALESCE(S.技术人员,M.技术人员,D.NAME,e.name) COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS 技术人员,
        M.客户确认日期,
        N.流道分析日期,
        o.bom AS 零件拆图时长,
        o.runner AS 模流分析时长,
        Procurement AS 采购模料时长,
        chenjiang AS 澄江完工时长,
        zongchang AS 总厂完工时长,
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, 客户确认日期) AS 计划下料出图,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' THEN NULL 
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, runner, 客户确认日期) 
        END AS 计划模流分析,

       CASE WHEN     c.Description NOT in (N'计量泵',N'分配器',N'合流器',N'换网器',N'静态混合器',N'连接器') then 
         CASE 
            WHEN (ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' OR 流道分析日期 < 客户确认日期  ) 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, bom, 客户确认日期)
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, bom, 流道分析日期)
        END 
		else 
		CASE 
            WHEN (ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' OR 流道分析日期 < 客户确认日期  ) 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, 4, 客户确认日期)
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, 4, 流道分析日期)
        END 
		end
		AS 计划BOM拆图,
        convert(varchar(10), p.dhdate,120) AS 计划澄江到料,
        DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
          case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
            scdate,
            p.dhdate,
            CASE 
                WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                ELSE G.ApprovedDate 
            END
        )) AS 计划总厂到料,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.8), 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                     case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.8), h.ApprovedDate)
        END AS 计划打光检验,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.9), 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                     case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.9), h.ApprovedDate)
        END AS 计划合模,
		  CASE WHEN   c.Description NOT in (N'计量泵',N'分配器',N'合流器',N'换网器',N'静态混合器',N'连接器') then 
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, zongchang, 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                    case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, zongchang, h.ApprovedDate)
        END
		 else  b.NeedByDate  end
		AS 计划完工,
           case when a.OrderNum='258059' THEN N'备用' ELSE  Q.Character11 END AS 项目备注,r.配套时间,case when b1.PartNum is null then N'否' else N'是' end  是否含配件,CycleTotal 总周期
    ,B.DATE19
	FROM OrderHed a
    INNER JOIN OrderDtl b 
        ON a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum AND a.Company = b.Company
	LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT OrderNum,PartNum,OrderLine FROM #AAA)b1 on b.OrderNum=b1.OrderNum and b.PartNum=b1.PartNum and b.OrderLine=b1.OrderLine
    
    LEFT JOIN (
     	select * from (SELECT A.PartNum,   b.Name,   xldate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PARTNUM ORDER BY A.PartNum,A.ApprovedDate) NUM
        FROM erp.PartRev a
		INNER JOIN (
		SELECT PartNum, RevisionNum, convert(varchar(10),min( ApprovedDate),120) AS xldate from 
		ERPLOG.dbo.RCOCHECKLOG  group by PartNum, RevisionNum) C ON A.PartNum =C.PartNum  COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS AND A.RevisionNum=C.RevisionNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
        INNER JOIN UserFile b ON a.ApprovedBy = b.DcdUserID 
        WHERE (  RevShortDesc LIKE N'%下料版%' ) --and a.PartNum='251227-200'
          --AND a.ApprovedBy NOT LIKE 'manager'
		  ) a where a.num=1
    ) d ON b.PartNum = d.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        
		select * from (SELECT A.PartNum,   b.Name,   scdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PARTNUM ORDER BY A.PartNum,A.ApprovedDate) NUM
        FROM erp.PartRev a
		INNER JOIN (
		SELECT PartNum, RevisionNum, convert(varchar(10),min( ApprovedDate),120) AS scdate from 
		ERPLOG.dbo.RCOCHECKLOG  group by PartNum, RevisionNum) C ON A.PartNum =C.PartNum  COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS AND A.RevisionNum=C.RevisionNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
        INNER JOIN UserFile b ON a.ApprovedBy = b.DcdUserID 
        WHERE (RevShortDesc LIKE N'%生产版%' OR RevShortDesc = '1') --and a.PartNum='251227-200'
          --AND a.ApprovedBy NOT LIKE 'manager'
		  ) a where a.num=1
     
    ) e ON b.PartNum = e.PartNum  
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.JobNum, a.PartNum
        FROM erp.JobHead a
        LEFT JOIN erp.JobProd b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE a.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-zz' 
          AND ISNULL(WarehouseCode, '') = ''
    ) f ON f.PartNum = b.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT a.CPNum, 
               CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = COUNT(TranDate) THEN MAX(TranDate) ELSE NULL END AS ApprovedDate
        FROM ApplyDataMl a
        LEFT JOIN PODetail b 
            ON a.ApplyNum = b.Character05 AND a.ApplyLine = b.Number03
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT PoNum, PoLine, MAX(ReceiptDate) AS TranDate
            FROM erp.RcvDtl
            WHERE Company = 'jctimes'
            GROUP BY PoNum, PoLine
        ) c ON b.PoNum = c.PoNum AND b.PoLine = c.PoLine
        GROUP BY a.CPNum
    ) g ON b.PartNum = g.CPNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT PartNum 
        FROM tempdata.dbo.MrpTDL
    ) gg ON b.PartNum = gg.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT a.CPNum, MAX(DHDate) AS DHDate
        FROM ApplyDataMl a
        GROUP BY a.CPNum
    ) p ON b.PartNum = p.CPNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT c.PartNum,-- Date19 ,PayrollDate,ApprovedDate
               CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(C.OpComplete AS FLOAT)) = COUNT(*) 
                    THEN convert(varchar(10),MAX(date19),120) ELSE NULL END AS ApprovedDate
        FROM (
            SELECT c.JobNum,b.PartNum, c.AssemblySeq, OpCode, OprSeq, LaborEntryMethod, c.Company, OpComplete,Date19,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.JobNum, c.AssemblySeq, c.Company 
                                      ORDER BY c.Company, c.JobNum, c.AssemblySeq, c.OprSeq) AS num
            FROM JobOper c
			INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON c.JobNum = b.JobNum AND c.Company = b.Company
			inner join erp.JobAsmbl d on c.JobNum =d.JobNum and c.AssemblySeq =d.AssemblySeq and c.Company =d.Company 
            WHERE   OpCode =  '680'  and d.Description not like N'%模唇%'     and d.Description not like N'%微调座%'    
              AND LaborEntryMethod = 'T' and c.OpComplete=1
              AND CheckBox01 = 0 --AND  C.JobNum ='251659-1-2'
        ) c
       
        INNER JOIN erp.JobMtl d 
            ON c.JobNum = d.JobNum 
            AND c.AssemblySeq = d.AssemblySeq 
            AND c.Company = d.Company
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT PartNum, CPNum, Company 
            FROM ApplyDataMl
        ) e ON d.PartNum = e.PartNum AND d.Company = e.Company
        WHERE  c.num = 1 --AND  C.JobNum ='251659-1-2'
        GROUP BY c.PartNum
 
    ) h ON b.PartNum = h.PartNum
       LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum,  MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120)) ApprovedDate
        FROM  JobOper a
        INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE OpCode = '730' AND A.OpComplete=1
         GROUP BY B.PartNum 
    ) i ON b.PartNum = i.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum, MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120))  AS ApprovedDate
        FROM JobOper a
        INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE OpCode IN ('270', '401') AND A.OpComplete=1
        GROUP BY B.PartNum 
    ) j ON b.PartNum = j.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum,  MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120)) AS ApprovedDate
        FROM JobOper a
        INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE OpCode IN ('CJ-ZJ', '820', '821', '822')  AND A.OpComplete=1
        GROUP BY B.PartNum  
    ) k ON b.PartNum = k.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT MIN(TranDate) AS TranDate, PartNum
        FROM erp.PartTran
        WHERE TranType IN ('MFG-STK') 
          AND PartNum NOT LIKE '%-zz'
        GROUP BY PartNum
    ) l ON l.PartNum = b.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                CASE WHEN _widget_1752648601150 LIKE '%-%' 
                     THEN LEFT(_widget_1752648601150, CHARINDEX('-', _widget_1752648601150) - 1)
                     ELSE _widget_1752648601150 
                END AS 销售订单号,
                _widget_1752648601151 AS 产品编号,
                _widget_1752738091852 AS 技术人员,
                _widget_1752651746377 AS 项目阶段,
                CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), _widget_1752648601152, 120) = '1900-01-01' 
                     THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), _widget_1752648601152, 120) 
                END AS 客户确认日期,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _widget_1752648601150, _widget_1752648601151 
                                  ORDER BY CreateTime DESC) AS num
            FROM [JCJDY]A.dbo.StageFollow
            WHERE _widget_1752651746377 = N'客户确认'
        ) a
        WHERE num = 1
    ) m ON b.OrderNum = m.销售订单号 
        AND m.产品编号 = b.PartNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                CASE WHEN _widget_1752648601150 LIKE '%-%' 
                     THEN LEFT(_widget_1752648601150, CHARINDEX('-', _widget_1752648601150) - 1)
                     ELSE _widget_1752648601150 
                END AS 销售订单号,
                _widget_1752648601151 AS 产品编号,
                _widget_1752738091852 AS 技术人员,
                _widget_1752651746377 AS 项目阶段,
                CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), _widget_1752648601152, 120) = '1900-01-01' 
                     THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), _widget_1752648601152, 120) 
                END AS 流道分析日期,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _widget_1752648601150, _widget_1752648601151 
                                  ORDER BY CreateTime DESC) AS num
            FROM [JCJDY]A.dbo.StageFollow
            WHERE _widget_1752651746377 = N'模流分析完成'
        ) a
        WHERE num = 1
    ) n ON b.OrderNum = n.销售订单号 
        AND n.产品编号 = b.PartNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                CASE WHEN _widget_1752648601150 LIKE '%-%' 
                     THEN LEFT(_widget_1752648601150, CHARINDEX('-', _widget_1752648601150) - 1)
                     ELSE _widget_1752648601150 
                END AS 销售订单号,
                 _widget_1752648601151 AS 产品编号,
				   _widget_1752738091852 AS 技术人员,

 TranType in ('MFG-STK','PUR-STK','INS-STK')) A WHERE A.num =1  )ij 
 on a.PartNum =ij.PartNum and a.Company =ij.Company

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
select  
a.Character02 销售负责人,a.OrderNum 订单,a.OrderDate 订单日期,case when a.OpenOrder =1 then N'未完结' else N'已完结' end as 订单状态
,d.Name 客户名称,a.Character01 下单人,b.PartNum 产品,b.LineDesc 描述,b.OrderQty 数量
,a.RequestDate 要求出货,isnull(G.TranDate,i.wgdate) [完工/入库]A,F.TranDate 实际出货 ,G.TranDate  入库日期,convert(varchar(10),i.wgdate,120) 完工日期
,case when  datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(F.TranDate,getdate()))>15 then N'提货异常' else N'' end 提货状态
,h.Description 销售分类,e.Description 群组 --,B.SalesCatID,A.CustNum
,1 as 订单计数,case when datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(F.TranDate,getdate()))>15 then 1 else 0 end 异常计数
from OrderHed a
inner join OrderDtl b on a.Company = b.Company and a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum
inner join Customer d on d.Company=a.Company and d.CustNum=a.CustNum
left join erp.ProdGrup e on e.Company = b.Company and e.ProdCode = b.ProdCode
left join erp.SalesCat h on h.Company = b.Company and h.SalesCatID=b.SalesCatID
left join (
	select Company,OrderNum,OrderLine,SUM(TranQty) TranQty,MAX(TranDate) TranDate
	from erp.PartTran 
	where TranType  in ('STK-CUS','MFG-CUS')
	GROUP BY Company,OrderNum,OrderLine
) F ON F.Company=B.Company AND F.OrderNum=B.OrderNum AND F.OrderLine = B.OrderLine AND F.TranQty>0
left join (
	select Company,PartNum,SUM(TranQty) TranQty,MAX(TranDate) TranDate
	from erp.PartTran 
	where TranType  in ('MFG-STK','PUR-STK')
	GROUP BY Company,PartNum
) G ON G.Company=B.Company AND G.PartNum=B.PartNum   AND G.TranQty>0
left join (
	select a.Company,a.PartNum,max(Date19) wgdate
	from JobHead a
	inner join JobOper b on a.Company=b.Company and a.JobNum=b.JobNum
	where b.OpCode  in ('820','821','822','cj-zj') -- and a.JobClosed=0 
	and b.OpComplete=1  and a.ProdCode  not in ('free','YF01') and b.AssemblySeq=0
	group by a.Company,a.PartNum
) I ON I.Company=B.Company AND I.PartNum=B.PartNum 
where a.Company ='jctimes'  and a.EntryPerson not like 'jcshb%' 
and A.CustNum not in ( 839086,7214,728,4454) AND B.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-100' AND B.SalesCatID NOT IN ('0003','0012','0002','0010','0005','0004')
and a.RequestDate<=getdate()
and a.OrderDate>='2023-01-01' 
and (G.TranDate  is not null or i.wgdate  is not null)
and (F.TranDate is not null or b.OpenLine=1)
--and datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(F.TranDate,getdate()))>30
and b.PartNum not in (select PartNum from erp.parttran where trantype in ('ins-stk'))
  ${if (len(下单开始日期)==0,""," and a.OrderDate >='"+下单开始日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(下单结束日期)==0,""," and a.OrderDate <='"+下单结束日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(销售负责人)==0,""," and  a.Character02 = N'"+销售负责人+"'")}
  ${if (len(订单号)==0,""," and  a.OrderNum  = N'"+订单号+"'")}
  ${if (len(客户名称)==0,""," and  d.Name like N'%"+客户名称+"%'")}
  ${if (仅异常," and datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(F.TranDate,getdate()))>15   ","")}
  ${if (仅未出库," and F.TranDate is null ","")}

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT *,case when 完工日期!='' then N'不为空'else N'为空' end as 判断完工日期 
FROM (select a.Character01 项目负责人, a.Character02 销售负责人,a.ordernum 订单编号,a.orderdate 下单日期,b.NeedByDate 订单交期,
DATEDIFF(DAY,A.OrderDate,B.NeedByDate) 订单周期,c.Description 类别,b.PartNum 产品编号,b.LineDesc 产品描述,xldate 下料出图,
scdate BOM拆图,G.ApprovedDate 澄江到料,h.ApprovedDate 总厂到料,I.ApprovedDate 打光检验日期,J.ApprovedDate 合模日期,k.ApprovedDate 完工日期,
l.TranDate 入库日期,b.Character03 产品状态 ,sum( case when isnull(l.TranDate,'')<>'' then 1 else 0 end) OVER (PARTITION BY A.ordernum) 入行库数 ,count(*) over (partition by a.ordernum) 订单总行数,  
 M.技术人员,M.客户确认日期,N.流道分析日期,b.OrderComment 生产备注,f.JobNum 工单号,jb.JobCode
from  OrderHed a inner join  orderdtl b on a.ordernum = b.OrderNum and a.Company=b.Company
inner join erp.ProdGrup c on b.ProdCode=c.ProdCode and b.Company=c.Company
left join 
(select PartNum,  Company,b.Name,max(ApprovedDate) xldate from erp.PartRev A INNER JOIN UserFile B ON A.ApprovedBy=B.DcdUserID  
where RevShortDesc like N'%下料版%' group by PartNum,  Company,b.Name ) d on b.PartNum =d.partnum and b.Company=d.Company
left join 
(select PartNum,  Company,b.Name,max(ApprovedDate) scdate from erp.PartRev a INNER JOIN UserFile B ON A.ApprovedBy=B.DcdUserID  
where RevShortDesc like N'%生产版%' group by PartNum, Company ,b.Name ) e on b.PartNum =e.partnum and b.Company=e.Company
left join erp.JobProd f on b.OrderNum=f.OrderNum and b.OrderLine=f.OrderLine and b.Company=f.Company
left join erp.JobHead jb on f.JobNum=jb.JobNum and f.Company=jb.Company
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT JobNum,Company,max(ApprovedDate) ApprovedDate  FROM ERP.LaborDtl WHERE OpCode='621' group by JobNum,Company) g on f.JobNum=g.JobNum and f.Company =g.Company
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT JobNum,Company,max(ApprovedDate) ApprovedDate  FROM ERP.LaborDtl WHERE OpCode='680' group by JobNum,Company) h on f.JobNum=h.JobNum and f.Company =h.Company
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT JobNum,Company,max(ApprovedDate) ApprovedDate  FROM ERP.LaborDtl WHERE OpCode='730' group by JobNum,Company) I on f.JobNum=I.JobNum and f.Company =I.Company
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT JobNum,Company,max(ApprovedDate) ApprovedDate  FROM ERP.LaborDtl WHERE OpCode IN ('270','401') group by JobNum,Company) J on f.JobNum=J.JobNum and f.Company =J.Company
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT JobNum,Company,max(ApprovedDate) ApprovedDate  FROM ERP.LaborDtl WHERE OpCode IN ('CJ-ZJ','820') group by JobNum,Company) k on f.JobNum=k.JobNum and f.Company =k.Company
left join (select jobnum,Company,min(TranDate) TranDate from erp.parttran  where TranType ='MFG-STK' group by JobNum,Company ) l on l.JobNum=f.JobNum and l.Company =f.Company
left join (  select * from 
(select case when _widget_1752648601150 like '%-%' then  LEFT(_widget_1752648601150,CHARINDEX('-',_widget_1752648601150)-1)  else _widget_1752648601150 end    as [销售订单号]A,
_widget_1752648601151 as [产品编号]A
,_widget_1752738091852 as [技术人员]A,_widget_1752651746377 as [项目阶段]A,
case when CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),_widget_1752648601152,120)='1900-01-01' THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),_widget_1752648601152,120) END as 客户确认日期,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _widget_1752648601150,_widget_1752648601151 ORDER BY createTime DESC ) NUM
from [JCJDY]A.dbo.[StageFollow]A  WHERE _widget_1752651746377	=N'客户确认'  ) a where num=1
) M ON B.ORDERNUM =M.[销售订单号]A AND m.[产品编号]A=B.partnum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS

left join ( select * from 
(select case when _widget_1752648601150 like '%-%' then  LEFT(_widget_1752648601150,CHARINDEX('-',_widget_1752648601150)-1)  else _widget_1752648601150 end  as [销售订单号]A,
_widget_1752648601151 as [产品编号]A
,_widget_1752738091852 as [技术人员]A,_widget_1752651746377 as [项目阶段]A,
case when CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),_widget_1752648601152,120)='1900-01-01' THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),_widget_1752648601152,120) END as 流道分析日期,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _widget_1752648601150,_widget_1752648601151 ORDER BY createTime DESC ) NUM
from [JCJDY]A.dbo.[StageFollow]A  WHERE _widget_1752651746377	=N'模流分析完成'  ) a where num=1
) N ON B.ORDERNUM =N.[销售订单号]A AND N.[产品编号]A=B.partnum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
where c.Company='jctimes' and c.Company='jctimes' and b.SalesCatID='0001'  
--AND OpenLine=1   
and b.partnum not like '%-100'  
and a.OrderDate>='2024-01-01' -- and jb.JobCode='2' 
and  case when b.Character03='' then N'正常' ELSE b.Character03 END  =N'正常'
${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and  b.partnum like '%"+产品编号+"%'")}
${if (len(订单编号)==0,"","and  a.ordernum like '"+订单编号+"%'")}
${if (len(产品状态)==0,""," and  case when b.Character03='' then N'正常' ELSE b.Character03 END  = N'"+产品状态+"'")}
${if (len(项目负责人)==0,"","and  a.Character01 = N'"+项目负责人+"'")}   
${if (len(销售负责人)==0,"","and  a.Character02 = N'"+销售负责人+"'")}  
${if (len(订单关闭)==0,"","and OpenLine = '"+订单关闭+"'")}  
) A WHERE 1=1  --A.订单总行数<>A.入行库数
${if (len(完工日期)==0,"","and case when 完工日期!='' then N'不为空'else N'为空' end = N'"+完工日期+"'")}  
 order by 下单日期 desc,工单号 asc

select IDENTITY (int,1,1) rownum,b.RMALine, B.partnum,a.RMANum,RMADate,a.Company,C.NAME ,d.PartDescription ,f.Name 下单人   into #temp
from Erp.RMAHead a inner join Erp.RMADtl b on a.RMANum =b.RMANum and a.Company =b.Company 
inner join Erp.Customer C on a.CustNum =C.CustNum 
inner join Erp.Part d on b.PartNum =d.PartNum and b.Company =d.Company 
left join erp.OrderHed e on e.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and a.Company=b.Company
left join erp.UserFile f on e.EntryPerson =f.DcdUserID  
where a.Company ='jctimes'   and ReturnReasonCode='007'  and RMADate >='2024-06-01'  
order by RMADate
 
 
select rownum, a.PartNum 产品编号,a.PartDescription 产品描述 ,a.RMANum 退货单号 ,a.RMADate 退货日期 ,a.Name  退货客户, c.ExtCost 一次发货成本, k.ExtCost 退货成本,
c.第一次发货时间,g.二次入库日期 ,g.ExtCost 二次入库成本,
h.发货时间二,i.Name 二次发货客户,g.JobNum 二次入库工单 ,(CASE WHEN  isnull(j.PartNum ,'')<>'' then N'是' ELSE '' END) 是否含维修工单,cast (L.OnhandQty as float) OnhandQty,
A.下单人
from #temp a 
left join (select a.PartNum ,a.Company ,a.ExtCost,A.trandate   第一次发货时间 from Erp.PartTran a inner join  (
select  MAX(TranNum )TranNum,a.PartNum ,a.Company  from Erp.PartTran a inner join #temp  b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company 
where TranType ='stk-cus'  and a.TranDate <=b.RMADate
group by a.PartNum ,a.Company
) b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company   AND a.TranNum =b.TranNum   where TranType ='stk-cus') c on a.PartNum =c.PartNum and a.Company =c.Company   

--left join (select a.PartNum ,a.Company ,a.ExtCost,A.trandate 入库时间  from Erp.PartTran a inner join  (
--select min(trandate) trandate,max(TranNum )TranNum,a.PartNum ,a.Company  from Erp.PartTran a inner join #temp  b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company 
--where TranType ='MFG-STK' and a.TranDate >=b.RMADate
--group by a.PartNum ,a.Company)
-- b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company and a.TranDate =b.trandate AND a.TranNum =b.TranNum   where TranType ='MFG-STK') d on a.PartNum =d.PartNum and a.Company =d.Company   
 left join (select  a.RMANum,a.Company ,a.RMALine ,a.ExtCost  from Erp.PartTran a inner join #temp b on a.RMANum =b.RMANum and b.RMALine =b.RMALine and a.Company =b.Company  where TranType ='INS-STK') k on k.RMANum=a.RMANum and k.RMALine =a.RMALine and k.Company =a.Company 
 
left join (
select max(f.TranDate) 二次入库日期 ,f.JobNum ,f.Company ,f.PartNum,f.ExtCost   from Erp.PartTran f inner join ( 
select a.PartNum ,a.Company ,a.JobNum    from Erp.PartTran a inner join  (
select min(trandate) trandate,max(TranNum )TranNum,a.PartNum ,a.Company  from Erp.PartTran a inner join #temp  b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company 
where TranType ='STK-MTL' and a.TranDate >=b.RMADate
group by a.PartNum ,a.Company)
 b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company and a.TranDate =b.trandate AND a.TranNum =b.TranNum   where TranType ='STK-MTL') E on f.PartNum =E.PartNum and f.Company =E.Company  and E.JobNum =f.JobNum
 where TranType ='MFG-STK' group by f.Company ,f.PartNum,f.ExtCost,F.JobNum
 )  g on g.PartNum =a.PartNum and g.Company =a.Company  and 二次入库日期>=RMADate

LEFT JOIN 
( 
select b.*,a.OrderNum ,a.CustNum  from Erp.PartTran a  inner join ( 
select MIN(TranDate ) 发货时间二,a.partnum,a.company ,MAX(TranNum ) TranNum from Erp.PartTran a inner join #temp b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum and a.Company =b.Company 
where TranType ='STK-CUS' and TranDate >=b.RMADate 
group by a.partnum,a.company ) b on a.TranDate =b.发货时间二 and a.PartNum =b.PartNum  and a.TranNum =b.TranNum   and a.Company =b.Company 
) h on h.PartNum =a.PartNum and h.Company =a.Company  and 发货时间二>=a.RMADate 
left join Erp.Customer i on h.CustNum=i.CustNum and h.Company =i.Company 
left join (SELECT PartNum,SUM(OnhandQty) OnhandQty FROM ERP.PARTBIN GROUP BY PartNum ) L ON A.PartNum=L.PartNum
left join (select DISTINCT A.PartNum ,A.Company,CreateDate   from Erp.JobHead A INNER JOIN #temp B ON A.PartNum like '%'+a.PartNum+'%' AND CreateDate >=RMADate 

where A.PartNum like '%wx%'  ) j on j.PartNum like '%'+a.PartNum+'%'  and j.Company =a.Company  and j.CreateDate >=a.RMADate 
order by rownum 
drop table #temp

LEFT JOIN PUB.OrderRel B ON (A.Company=B.Company AND A.OrderNum=B.OrderNum AND A.OrderLine=B.OrderLine) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.OrderHed C ON (B.Company=C.Company AND B.OrderNum=C.OrderNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.Customer D ON (C.Company=D.Company AND C.CustNum=D.CustNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.ShipTo E ON (D.CustNum=E.CustNum AND D.Company=E.Company AND B.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.CustCnt F ON (F.Company=E.Company AND F.CustNum=E.CustNum AND F.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum AND B.ShpConNum=F.ConNum) 
LEFT JOIN ( 
SELECT A1.Company, 
A1.PartNum, 
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc001' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty1,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc002' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty2,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='ysc' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty3
FROM PUB.PartWhse A1 
WHERE A1.WarehouseCode IN ('cpc001','cpc002','ysc') AND A1.Company='jctimes'
Group By A1.Company,A1.PartNum 
) G ON (A.PartNum=G.PartNum AND A.Company=G.Company)
WHERE A.Company='jctimes' AND B.OpenRelease=1 AND A.KitCompOrigSeq=0 AND A.CheckBox20=1 AND a.prodcode LIKE '%0910%'
order by A.date19

SELECT  N'工单BOM' bom类别, LEFT(CreateDate,4) 年份,CASE when c.TypeCode='P' then N'原材料' else N'半成品'END  物料属性 , B.PartNum ,c.PartDescription ,
COUNT(*) 次数,cast (SUM(RequiredQty) AS float ) 数量,B.IUM   into #temp
FROM ERP.JOBHEAD A INNER JOIN Erp.JobAsmbl  B ON A.JobNum =B.JobNum AND A.Company =B.Company   
inner join Erp.Part c on B.PartNum =c.PartNum and B.Company =c.Company  
inner join Erp.Part d on A.PartNum =d.PartNum and A.Company =d.Company 
WHERE A.CreateDate >='2023-01-01' and  A.CreateDate <='2024-12-31'  AND  B.AssemblySeq<>0  and D.ProdCode in ('401','0910')
 ${ if(len(物料编号) == 0,""," and B.PartNum ='"+ 物料编号+"' ")}-- AND B.PartNum ='0502010280'

GROUP BY   LEFT(CreateDate,4),B.PartNum  ,c.PartDescription,B.IUM,CASE when c.TypeCode='P' then N'原材料' else N'半成品'END
UNION ALL
 SELECT  N'工单BOM', LEFT(CreateDate,4) 年份,CASE when c.TypeCode='P' then N'原材料' else N'半成品'END  物料属性,  B.PartNum, c.PartDescription,COUNT(*),cast (SUM(RequiredQty) AS float ),B.IUM 
 FROM ERP.JOBHEAD
 A INNER JOIN Erp.JobMtl   B ON A.JobNum =B.JobNum AND A.Company =B.Company   
 inner join Erp.Part c on B.PartNum =c.PartNum and B.Company =c.Company 
 inner join Erp.Part d on A.PartNum =d.PartNum and A.Company =d.Company 
WHERE A.CreateDate >='2023-01-01' and  A.CreateDate <='2024-12-31'  and D.ProdCode in ('401','0910')  ${ if(len(物料编号) == 0,""," and B.PartNum ='"+ 物料编号+"' ")} -- AND B.PartNum ='0502010280'      
GROUP BY   LEFT(CreateDate,4),B.PartNum ,c.PartDescription,B.IUM ,CASE when c.TypeCode='P' then N'原材料' else N'半成品'END
--order by   COUNT(*) desc ,SUM(RequiredQty) desc
 
union all
 
 select N'设计BOM',YEAR ,CASE WHEN 物料类型='P' then N'原材料' ELSE N'半成品' end,配件编号,配件描述 ,count(1),SUM(数量),单位
from DesighBOM WHERE 1=1  ${ if(len(物料编号) == 0,""," and 配件编号 ='"+ 物料编号+"' ")} -- AND B.MtlPartNum ='0502010280'
group by 配件编号,配件描述,CASE WHEN 物料类型='P' then N'原材料' ELSE N'半成品' end,YEAR,单位
 order by  COUNT(*) desc ,CAST(SUM(RequiredQty) AS FLOAT) desc


 select a.*,CAST (D.OnhandQty AS float ) OnhandQty,c.Description classdes,b.PartDescription ,E.DJ ,F.FLDATE from #temp a left join Erp.Part b on a.PartNum =b.PartNum 
left join Erp.PartClass c on b.ClassID =c.ClassID and b.Company =c.Company 
left join (
select PartNum ,Company,sum(OnhandQty)OnhandQty  from Erp.PartBin WHERE Company ='JCTIMES' group  by PartNum,Company  ) D ON a.PartNum =D.PartNum AND c.Company =D.Company 
left join (select partnum,dj from (SELECT partnum,row_number() over( partition by PartNum order by TranDate desc ) No,MtlUnitCost +LbrUnitCost +BurUnitCost +SubUnitCost dj  FROM ERP.PartTran
WHERE TranDate >='2023-01-01' AND TranDate <='2024-12-31' AND TranQty >0 AND (MtlUnitCost +LbrUnitCost +BurUnitCost +SubUnitCost>0) AND Company ='JCTIMES') a where no=1 ) E ON a.PartNum=e.PartNum 
LEFT JOIN (select PartNum ,MAX(TranDate ) FLDATE from Erp.PartTran where TranType  IN ('STK-MTL','STK-UKN') AND Company ='JCTIMES'
GROUP BY PartNum ) F ON a.PartNum =F.PartNum 
DROP TABLE #temp

reportNames: 采购阶段每日到料情况
coreJoins: Erp.OrderHed -> Erp.OrderDtl ON Company + OrderLine + OrderNum + OrderRelNum
Erp.JobOper -> Erp.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobAsmbl -> Erp.LaborDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
businessFamilies.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT convert(nvarchar(10),e.date20 ,120), 
count(f.Description)
 FROM erp.JobHead a 
LEFT JOIN erp.JobProd b
ON a.JobNum =b.JobNum and a.Company = b.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.OrderHed c
ON b.OrderNum = c.OrderNum AND b.Company = c.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.OrderDtl d
ON b.OrderNum= d.OrderNum AND b.OrderLine = d.OrderLine AND b.OrderRelNum = b.OrderRelNum AND b.Company= d.Company
LEFT JOIN JobOper e	
ON a.JobNum = e.JobNum AND a.Company = e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl AS f
ON f.JobNum= e.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq=e.AssemblySeq AND f.Company=e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl AS g
ON g.JobNum=e.JobNum AND g.AssemblySeq=e.AssemblySeq AND g.OprSeq = e.OprSeq AND g.Company= e.Company

WHERE a.company='jctimes' and e.date20 >=getdate()-19
 AND A.CREATEDATE>='2020-1-1' AND e.OpComplete <>'1' and e.opcode like 'wb%'
 GROUP BY convert(nvarchar(10),e.date20 ,120)

coreJoins: Erp.PODetail -> Erp.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,b.poline,a.BuyerID,a.TermsCode,f.Description,
case when 
a.termscode = '01' then N'现结'
when a.termscode = '23' then N'现结'
else N'月结' end as tk,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.openLine,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN erp.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
left join erp.PurTerms f on (f.company = a.company and f.termscode = a.termscode)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2024-1-1' AND a.Approve ='1'
AND c.VendorID <>'1019' and d.name not in (N'段冬梅',N'董君君',N'孙佳盼',N'黄安娜',N'章晶晶')
and a.Character01 not in(N'精一新材料',N'何金伟') and d.buyerid<>'05'

 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  case when 
a.termscode = '01' then N'现结'
when a.termscode = '23' then N'现结'
else N'月结' end desc,e.duedate asc

coreJoins: Erp.Part -> Erp.PartMtl ON Company + PartNum + RevisionNum
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
select Company,PartNum,RevisionNum  into #rev 
 from (      
 select Company,PartNum,RevisionNum,ChangedOn   ,row_number() over(partition by PartNum order by ChangedOn desc) No,ApprovedBy    
 from erp.partrev A  
  where 1=1
  and A.ApprovedDate >='2026-04-28'
and A.ApprovedDate <='2026-04-28'
 ) a 
 where No=1  

 --declare @con int =5

 --while (@con>1)
 --begin
	-- insert into #rev(Company,PartNum,RevisionNum)
	-- select Company,PartNum,RevisionNum  
	-- from (      
	-- select Company,PartNum,RevisionNum,ChangedOn   ,row_number() over(partition by PartNum order by ChangedOn desc) No,ApprovedBy    
	-- from erp.partrev

 select a.ApprovedDate 模头上传日期,a.PartNum 编号,a1.PartDescription 描述,a.Character01 订单难度
 ,isnull(d.OrderQty,1) 数量 ,c.Name 模头设计,d.Character01 下单人,case when d.EntryPerson like 'jcshb%' then N'售后单' else N'新订单' end 类型 
 ,b.MtlPartNum 物料1,b1.PartDescription 描述1,b.QtyPer 用量1 ,m.MtlPartNum 物料2,b2.PartDescription 描述2,m.QtyPer 用量2 ,m1.MtlPartNum 物料3,b3.PartDescription 描述3,m1.QtyPer 用量3 ,m2.MtlPartNum 物料4,b4.PartDescription 描述4,m2.QtyPer 用量4 
 from partrev a 
 inner join erp.part a1 on a1.Company=a.Company and a.PartNum=a1.PartNum 
 inner join erp.UserComp c on c.Company=a.Company and c.DcdUserID=a.ApprovedBy 
 left join (  
	 select a.Company,a.PartNum,a.LineDesc,a.OrderNum,a.OrderQty
	 ,row_number() over(partition by a.Company,a.PartNum order by b.ordernum desc ) No,b.Character01,b.EntryPerson  
	 from OrderDtl a   
	 inner join OrderHed b on a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum  
	 inner join erp.Part p on p.Company=a.Company and p.PartNum=a.PartNum
	 where b.OrderDate >'2026-01-01' and a.Company='jctimes' and b.CustNum not in (839086,3) and p.TypeCode <>'P'
 ) d on d.PartNum=a.PartNum and d.Company=a.Company and d.No=1 
 inner join erp.PartMtl b on a.Company=b.Company and a.PartNum=b.PartNum and a.RevisionNum=b.RevisionNum  
 inner join erp.part b1 on b1.Company=a.Company and b.MtlPartNum=b1.PartNum 
 left join erp.PartMtl m on m.Company=b.Company and m.PartNum=b.MtlPartNum and b.ViewAsAsm=1 
 left join erp.part b2 on b2.Company=m.Company and m.MtlPartNum=b2.PartNum 
 left join #rev r on r.Company=m.Company and r.PartNum=m.PartNum  
 left join erp.PartMtl m1 on m1.Company=m.Company and m1.PartNum=m.MtlPartNum and m.ViewAsAsm=1 
 left join erp.part b3 on b3.Company=m1.Company and m1.MtlPartNum=b3.PartNum 
 left join #rev r1 on r1.Company=m1.Company and r1.PartNum=m1.PartNum   
 left join erp.PartMtl m2 on m2.Company=m1.Company and m2.PartNum=m1.MtlPartNum and m1.ViewAsAsm=1
 left join erp.part b4 on b4.Company=m2.Company and m2.MtlPartNum=b4.PartNum 
 left join #rev r2 on r2.Company=m2.Company and r2.PartNum=m2.PartNum  
 where  1=1 and a.Company='jctimes'  --and a.PartNum ='2025JC009-02'   


and A.ApprovedDate >='2026-04-28'
and A.ApprovedDate <='2026-04-28'
 order by a.PartNum,b.MtlSeq,m.MtlSeq,m1.MtlSeq,m2.MtlSeq    

 drop table #rev

SELECT a.Identifier,a.DateStampedOn,a.LogText,a.TableName,a.Key1,a.Key2,b.PartDescription,
c.Description AS wlms,d.Description AS qzms,g.PrimWhse,f.Description AS ck,
b.ProdCode,b.ClassID FROM ice.ChgLog a
LEFT JOIN erp.Part b ON (a.Key1 = b.PartNum AND a.Company= b.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PartClass c ON ( b.Company = c.Company AND b.ClassID = c.ClassID)
LEFT JOIN erp.ProdGrup d ON (b.Company = d.Company AND b.ProdCode = d.ProdCode)
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartPlant g ON (b.Company = g.Company AND b.PartNum= g.PartNum)
LEFT JOIN Erp.Warehse f ON (g.Company = f.Company AND g.PrimWhse= f.WarehouseCode)
WHERE a.Company='jctimes'AND a.DateStampedOn>='2020-11-1'  AND b.ProdCode LIKE '%01%'
AND a.TableName ='part' 
 order by a.DateStampedOn

coreJoins: Erp.PODetail -> Erp.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.openLine,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM erp.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)

AND c.VendorID <>'1019' 
 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  ${cname} ${orderby}

reportNames: 采购阶段每日到料情况
businessFamilies.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,A.PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN N'完成' ELSE N'未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete > A.DueDate) THEN N'延期完成' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete <= A.DueDate) THEN N'正常完成' 
ELSE N'未开始' END AS fxPhaseStatus,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.Date20,120)+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.DateComplete,120)+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN N'天' ELSE N'小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 ,A.Character02,c.Name ,b.StartDate,b.EndDate
FROM ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN erp.Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
LEFT JOIN erp.UserFile c
ON a.Character01 = c.DcdUserID
inner JOIN erp.PORel e ON (a.ProjectID=e.ProjectID AND A.Company = e.Company AND a.PhaseID = e.WBSPhaseID)
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.ParentPhase = N'采购部' and A.DueDate >='2020-3-1' and A.DueDate <='2020-12-31' 
AND a.PhaseStatus ='C'
order by A.DateComplete desc

coreJoins: PUB.ECORev -> PUB.Partmtl ON Company + AltMethod + PartNum + RevisionNum
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT  a.PartNum,a.RevisionNum,a.Approved,a.PartDescription AS cpdesc,
a.ApprovedBy, b.QtyPer,b.MtlSeq,b.MtlPartNum,b.MfgComment,b.PullAsAsm,b.ParentAltMethod,b.ParentMtlSeq,c.PartDescription,b.RevisionNum AS brev,b2.MtlPartNum AS twopartnum, c2.PartDescription AS towdesc,b2.MfgComment AS twomfg,b2.qtyper as twoqty
FROM PUB.ECORev a
LEFT JOIN PUB.partmtl b 
ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.RevisionNum = b.RevisionNum AND a.PartNum = b.PartNum  AND a.AltMethod = b.AltMethod )
LEFT JOIN PUB.Part c
ON (b.MtlPartNum= c.PartNum AND b.Company = c.Company)
left JOIN PUB.PartMtl b2
ON (b.Company =b2.Company AND b.MtlPartNum = b2.PartNum  )
left JOIN PUB.Part c2
ON (b2.MtlPartNum = c2.PartNum AND c2.Company = b2.Company)
WHERE  a.Company ='jctimes' and a.RevisionNum <>'1'
 ${if (len(完工日期大于)==0,"","and a.ApprovedDate>='"+完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(完工日期小于)==0,"","and a.ApprovedDate<='"+完工日期小于+"'")}
  ${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and  a.PartNum='"+产品编号+"'")}
  ${if (len(版本编号)==0,"","and  a.RevisionNum='"+版本编号+"'")}
order by b.mtlseq,b2.mtlseq asc

coreJoins: Erp.OrderDtl -> Erp.OrderRel ON Company + OrderLine + OrderNum
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
with AAA(RequestDate,PartNum,LineDesc,OrderNum,No )
AS(
select a.RequestDate,a.PartNum,a.LineDesc,a.OrderNum
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY a.RequestDate ORDER BY a.RequestDate,a.OrderNum) No
from OrderDtl  a 
inner join erp.OrderRel b on a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and a.OrderLine=b.OrderLine
where a.ProdCode in ('0910','0918','091031')  AND A.COMPANY='JCTIMES'
and a.RequestDate>'2026-01-01' and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.PartNum not like '%-096'
and a.PartNum not like 'JK-%'
and a.PartNum not like '%-095'
and a.SalesCatID<>'0004'
and a.Character03<>N'暂停'
and a.CustNum<>839086
 ${ if(len(date1) == 0,""," and a.RequestDate>='"+ date1+"' ")}
 ${ if(len(date2) == 0,""," and a.RequestDate<='"+ date2+"' ")}
and (b.OurJobShippedQty+b.OurStockShippedQty>0 or b.OpenRelease=1)
--order by a.RequestDate,a.OrderNum 
)

select a.RequestDate,b.No,c.*
from (
	SELECT distinct RequestDate FROM AAA
)a 
inner join (
	SELECT distinct No FROM AAA
) b on 1=1
left join AAA c on c.RequestDate=a.RequestDate and c.No=b.No
order by a.RequestDate,b.No

coreJoins: PUB.JobAsmbl -> PUB.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.jobnum,a.partnum,a.description,a.qtyper,b.MtlSeq,b.PartNum AS mpartnum,b.Description AS mdesc,c.PartNum AS cppartnum,c.PartDescription,a.jobnum,b.IssuedQty,b.IssuedComplete,
b.qtyper AS mqtyper,b.RequiredQty,b.ium,b.MfgComment FROM PUB.JobAsmbl AS a
LEFT JOIN PUB.JobMtl b
ON a.Company = b.Company AND a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.AssemblySeq = b.AssemblySeq
LEFT JOIN PUB.JobHead c
ON c.Company = a.Company AND c.JobNum = a.JobNum
WHERE  a.Company ='jctimes' 
AND a.description like '%销售套件%' 
${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and a.jobnum='"+产品编号+"'")}
order by b.issuedComplete asc

SELECT year(a.OrderDate) ,year(a.OrderDate)*100+month(a.orderdate),sum(b.sellingquantity),
round(sum(b.DocUnitPrice)/10000,2) as "销售额"
FROM PUB.OrderHed AS a
LEFT JOIN PUB.OrderDtl AS b 
ON a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum AND a.Company = b.Company

WHERE a.Company = 'jctimes'and a.OrderDate>='2016-1-1' and a.OrderDate <'2017-08-01' and  b.ProdCode<>091001 and b.ProdCode<>09100102
AND b.PartNum<>'0906010001' AND b.PartNum<>'0906010002'
AND a.EntryPerson LIKE 'jcyxb%' 
and b.salescatid<>0004 and  b.salescatid<>''

group by year(a.OrderDate), year(a.OrderDate)*100+month(a.orderdate)
order by year(a.OrderDate), year(a.OrderDate)*100+month(a.orderdate)

SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN '在制品' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN '完成' ELSE '未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
to_char(A.Date20,'YYYY-MM-DD')+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+
RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
to_char(A.DateComplete,'YYYY-MM-DD')+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+
RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN '天' ELSE '小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 
FROM PUB.ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN PUB.Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.ParentPhase <>''
and A.DueDate >='2017-04-01' and A.DueDate <='2017-12-31'
 ${if (len(要求完工日期大于)==0,"","and A.DueDate>='"+要求完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(要求完工日期小于)==0,"","and A.DueDate<='"+要求完工日期小于+"'")}
 ${if(len(父阶段)==0,"","and  A.ParentPhase in ('"+父阶段+"')")}
  ${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and  A.ProjectID='"+产品编号+"'")} 
ORDER BY a.sortseq

SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,b.StartDate,b.EndDate
FROM ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'   

AND A.StartDate>='2022-8-28'
AND A.ParentPhase LIKE N'技术部'
AND A.PhaseID LIKE N'总结构图'

SELECT a.EntryPerson,a.OrderDate,b.PartNum,b.LineDesc FROM Erp.OrderHed a
inner JOIN Erp.OrderDtl b ON (a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum AND a.Company= b.Company)
WHERE a.OrderDate >='2022-8-30' AND a.Company='jctimes'
AND a.EntryPerson like'jcyxb%'
AND b.ProdCode LIKE '0910%'

 ${if (len(变动日期)==0,"","and a.OrderDate>='"+变动日期+"'")}

SELECT  c.OpDesc,a.Date02, count(a.OpComplete) OpComplete,

demoFilteredFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.DocUnitCost,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,
e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease,f.OnHandQty ,f.WarehouseCode,g.Description AS zdms,g.LineType,g.ExtCost,g.DocExtCost,h.InvoiceNum,h.InvoiceDate
FROM erp.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN erp.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
LEFT JOIN erp.PartWhse f ON (f.Company = b.Company AND  b.PartNum = f.PartNum)
left JOIN Erp.APInvDtl g ON (g.Company=a.Company AND g.Ponum=a.PONum)
LEFT JOIN Erp.APInvHed h 
ON (g.Company = h.Company AND g.InvoiceNum = h.InvoiceNum AND g.VendorNum =h.VendorNum)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2020-3-1' AND a.Approve ='1'
and a.PONum =${订单号}
order by e.DueDate desc
